sections.one_line: Reasons Kernos chose Playwright over crawl4ai and playwright-mcp
Persistent browser context, page reuse, and extraction behavior for Kernos tool calls
Persistent browser profile storage, login state, and lock handling
Failure handling for navigation timeouts, auth-gated pages, JS errors, and slow network waits
Disk space and dependency requirements for installing Kernos browser support
Known gaps and future follow-on specs for tabs, stealth, profiles, downloads, screenshots, and PDFs
